name: Kimi K2.5
archDisplay: 1T-parameter MoE, 32B active/token, 384 experts (8 routed + 1 shared), 61 layers (1 dense), MLA attention, 160K vocab, SwiGLU; native multimodal via 400M-param MoonViT vision encoder
note: Predecessor to Kimi K2.6 (whose own docs explicitly call it 'Successor to K2.5'); Moonshot's first native-multimodal flagship, built via continual pretraining atop Kimi-K2-Base on ~15T mixed vision+text tokens. Introduced native image/video understanding and the 'Agent Swarm' research-preview multi-agent orchestration (self-directed, up to 100 sub-agents, ~1,500 coordinated tool-call steps), trained with Parallel-Agent Reinforcement Learning (PARL). Vendor claims near-frontier coding/reasoning/vision performance versus GPT-5.2 and Claude Opus 4.5-class closed models; independent Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index score was 38/100 (v4.1 methodology, ranked #14/95 open+closed models at time of measurement), corroborating strong but not universally frontier-topping performance. As of July 2026 it has been superseded as Moonshot's flagship by K2.6 but remains live and served via Moonshot's own API (platform.moonshot.ai) and third-party hosts (OpenRouter, Fireworks, etc.).

specSources.priceInput/priceOutput: https://artificialanalysis.ai/models/kimi-k2-5 (cross-checked against Moonshot AI's own provider row on https://openrouter.ai/moonshotai/kimi-k2.5)

results.notes: SWE-bench Verified, Kimi K2.5 (Thinking); independently corroborated by aireleasetracker.com's aggregator, which lists the same 76.8%
SWE-bench Pro, harder/agentic variant distinct from base swe-bench
GPQA-Diamond, avg@8, 96k-token completion budget; Artificial Analysis's independent re-run scored 87.9, closely matching
MMMU-Pro, official protocol (input order preserved, images prepended)

Humanity's Last Exam, full set (text+image), with tool use enabled (search/code-interpreter/web-browsing), used here for comparability with the sibling K2.6 entry's tool-enabled HLE figure; vendor also reports 30.1 without tools. Artificial Analysis's independent non-tool run scored 29.4, close to the vendor's own non-tool figure
Terminal-Bench 2.0, default Terminus-2 agent framework, evaluated in non-thinking mode due to context-management incompatibility with Terminus-2

BrowseComp with context management; vendor also reports 60.6 single-agent (no ctx mgmt) and 78.4 in the 'Agent Swarm' multi-agent research-preview mode. 74.9 used here for rough comparability with the sibling K2.6 entry's single-agent-style figure
CharXiv (RQ), Kimi K2.5 Thinking, avg@3, max-tokens=64k, from the official Kimi K2.5 tech blog benchmark appendix table.
MathVision, Kimi K2.5 Thinking, avg@3, no python tool use.
CyberGym, Kimi K2.5 Thinking, averaged over 5 runs using Moonshot's in-house coding-eval framework.

verificationNotes: Confirmed as a real, released, and still-served model (not a rumor or vendor teaser). Architecture (1T total/32B active, 384 experts [8 routed + 1 shared], 61 layers [1 dense], MLA attention, 160K vocab, SwiGLU, 400M-param MoonViT vision encoder) and license (Modified MIT) verified directly on the official Hugging Face model card (huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2.5) and cross-checked against the official Kimi tech blog (kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-5), which present identical spec tables. Release date January 27, 2026 independently corroborated by TechCrunch's same-day coverage, OpenRouter's model listing ('Released Jan 27, 2026'), Artificial Analysis's model page (independently states 'released on January 27, 2026'), and multiple third-party trackers (aireleasetracker.com, pricepertoken.com, benchlm.ai) that all agree on the date. Pricing ($0.60/M input cache-miss, $3.00/M output, ~$0.10/M cache-hit) confirmed on Artificial Analysis's independently measured provider data and matches the 'Moonshot AI' direct-provider row shown on OpenRouter exactly. Benchmark scores are taken from the official Kimi K2.5 blog/HF results table (Kimi K2.5 'Thinking' configuration, the config the vendor itself reports as the flagship numbers): SWE-Bench Verified (76.8) is independently corroborated by a third-party tracker (aireleasetracker.com) reporting the identical 76.8%; GPQA-Diamond (87.6) is closely corroborated by Artificial Analysis's own independent re-run (87.9); HLE is reported here using the tool-augmented full-set score (50.2) for comparability with the sibling K2.6 entry's HLE figure, and Artificial Analysis's independent non-tool HLE run (29.4) is in the same range as the vendor's own non-tool figure (30.1), i.e. no red flags of inflated self-reporting. Overall Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index = 38/100 (v4.1 composite of GDPval-AA v2, tau3-Banking, Terminal-Bench v2.1, SciCode, HLE, GPQA-Diamond, CritPt, AA-Omniscience, AA-LCR), independently measured and broadly consistent with (though less flattering than) Moonshot's own selective benchmark table — mirroring the same self-reported/independent gap pattern documented on the sibling K2.6 corpus entry. As of July 2026 the model has been superseded as Moonshot's flagship by Kimi K2.6 (whose own note/docs explicitly call it 'Successor to K2.5') but remains live and actively served today via Moonshot's own API (platform.moonshot.ai) and third-party hosts (OpenRouter, Fireworks, ModelRun, Chutes, etc.), so it is catalogued as status=released rather than deprecated.
